violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Observed an apron touching the ice scooper in the back kitchen.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee applying gloves without washing hands.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Build up of debris behind clean in place equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Food build up in corners of cold hold unit.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Meatballs held at 125 F.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
